grant_title: Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) - New Hampshire
project_area: Public facilities, housing, economic development, microenterprise, and planning projects benefiting low- and moderate-income individuals
demographic_requirements: Projects must primarily benefit persons of low and moderate income
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include New Hampshire municipalities (cities, towns, counties) and sub-grantees (nonprofits or other entities). Funding is administered by CDFA and provided by HUD. Projects must align with CDBG objectives, such as improving economic opportunities, community revitalization, or housing rehabilitation for low- and moderate-income individuals.
